name: Jack Johnson Pickleball Courts
description: Jack Johnson Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Pittsburg, KS. There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Pittsburg YMCA
description: Pittsburg YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Pittsburg, KS. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, locker rooms, restrooms, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — $8 per day non member

name: Schlanger Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Schlanger Park Pickleball Courts in Pittsburg, KS! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
